sections.paragraph:
Original: צבה צובה צובא

Transliteration: tsôbâ' tsôbâh tsôbâh

Phonetic: tso-baw'

BDB Definition:

Zoba or Zobah = "station"
  1. the name of a portion of Syria which formed a separate kingdom in the times of Saul, David, and Solomon; located northeast of Damascus

Origin: from an unused root meaning to station

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
